ONYXPROTOCOL SECURITY COMPROMISE

Check if your address is affected.

Discovered On 2024-09-25
Stolen Amount 5 M
Affected Networks
Read More x.com

Description

We URGE all ONYX users to immediately revoke ALL approvals to our contracts until the issue is further resolved.

Users who haven't revoked may be subject to further potential Losses.
